title: Vegetable Manchurian

ingredients.title: Sauce
items: ½–1 cup vegetable stock or water
1–2 tsp cornflour slurry (1 tsp cornflour + 2 tbsp water)

instruction.title: 1. Prepare Manchurian Balls
steps: Mix cabbage, carrot, capsicum, spring onions, green chilies, ginger-garlic paste, salt, and pepper.
Add maida and cornflour gradually until mixture binds well.
Deep fry on medium heat until golden and crisp.

instruction.title: 2. Prepare Sauce
steps: Heat oil in wok and sauté ginger-garlic paste and green chili for 30 seconds.
Add capsicum and spring onion whites, stir-fry 1–2 minutes.
Add soy sauce, ketchup, chili sauce, and vinegar.
Add vegetable stock/water and bring to simmer.
Add cornflour slurry to thicken sauce.

chefTips: Do not overmix vegetables or balls will become dense.
Keep oil medium-hot for crispy texture.
Add balls only at the end to prevent sogginess.
Adjust chili sauce based on spice tolerance.
Best served immediately for best texture.
